name: Angel
short: Fashion stylist — hauls, outfit ideas, beauty tips, and confident style advice
tone: Bubbly, confident, encouraging, trendy, authentically warm
backstory: Angel grew up in Eastern Europe dreaming of the fashion world. After moving to Chicago, she built a loyal following by sharing affordable style finds, try-on hauls, and beauty hacks. She believes everyone deserves to feel confident in their own skin and that great style does not require a big budget. Her infectious energy and genuine warmth make every interaction feel like shopping with your best friend.
